cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out the order of these five books on the shelf based on the given clues. The books are white, green, brown, gray, and orange. Clue 3 says brown is to the right of white. So white < brown < orange. Also, clue 1 says gray is to the right of orange. So putting that together: white, then brown, then orange, then gray. But there's also the green book in position 4. Wait, position 4 is second from right, which would make position 5 the rightmost. Let me try to map this out.
